name: property managers handling 5–15 rental units tool
description: For property managers handling 5–15 rental units, inefficient rent collection causes cash flow gaps. We automate rent collection and maintenance requests instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets and emails.
problem_solved: Inefficient rent collection and maintenance request management

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient rent collection and maintenance request management
